title: The Indian Naval Armament Act, 1923
full_text: The Indian Naval Armament Act, 1923 भारतीय नौसैनिक सशस्‍त्रीकरण अधिनियम, 1923 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 192307 Act Number: 07 Enactment Date: 1923-03-05 Act Year: 1923 Short Title: The Indian Naval Armament Act, 1923 Hindi Title: भारतीय नौसैनिक सशस्‍त्रीकरण अधिनियम, 1923 Long Title: An Act to give effect The words "in the Provinces "repealed by the A.O.1950. to the Treaty for the Limitation Naval Armament. Ministry: Ministry of Defence Department: Department of Military Affairs Enforcement Date: 10-11-1923 Last Updated: 26-11-2018 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Restriction on building or equipping vessels of war. Section 4. Licences. Section 5. Offences. Section 6. Liability. Section 7. Seizure, detention and search of ships. Section 8. Procedure in forfeiture of ships. Section 9. Disposal of forfeit. Section 10. Special proof of relevant facts. Section 11. Penalties for proceeding to sea after seizure. Section 12. Power to enter dock-yards, etc. Section 13. Courts by which and conditions subject to which offences may be tried. Section 14. Indemnity. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE.
